mapper.select: select sys_id , menu_cd , menu_nm , parent_menu_cd , ord_no , tree_level , menu_url from sys_menu sm order by tree_level asc, ord_no asc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_menu ( sys_id , menu_cd , menu_nm , parent_menu_cd , ord_no , tree_level , menu_url , insert_user_id , insert_datetime , sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.menuCd}, #{item.menuNm}, #{item.parentMenuCd}, #{item.ordNo}, #{item.treeLevel}, #{item.menuUrl}, #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )

update.foreach: update sys_menu set menu_nm = #{item.menuNm}, ord_no = #{item.ordNo}, menu_url = #{item.menuUrl}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.delete:
delete from sys_menu where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select COUNT(*) > 0 where 1=1 and menu_cd in
#{item.menuCd}

select sys_id , menu_cd , menu_nm , parent_menu_cd , ord_no , tree_level , menu_url from sys_menu sm where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}

select sys_id , menu_cd , menu_nm , parent_menu_cd , ord_no , tree_level , menu_url from sys_menu sm where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
